title: I'm a Guild Receptionist, so I Want a Peaceful Life
overview: Alina became a guild receptionist because she thought it'd be an easy, safe, secure job. However, in reality, she's so swamped with work that she's stuck pulling overtime day after day... and she's had enough!

title: I May Be the Executioner, but I'll Be Fired if People Find Out, so I'll Have to Use Force
overview: Jade has found out that Alina is the Executioner and hounds her to join Silver Sword. Then a certain adventurer with a grudge sets a raid boss loose...

title: I May Be Silver Sword's Tank, but I Want to Take On a Really Tough Dungeon
overview: Glen has learned Alina's secret and proposes a duel. If she loses, she must go to the Chalk Tower with Silver Sword.

title: Relics, Secret Quests, and Dark Gods Keep Interfering with My Work, so I'll Destroy Them All
overview: The guiding crystal Jade gave Alina starts to glow, signaling that he's in peril, so Alina rushes to help.

title: I May Be Silver Sword's Healer, but Even I Could Use Some Healing
overview: Even after nursing Jade and Lowe back to health, Lululee is depressed over the loss of her weapon and skills.

title: I May Be Silver Sword's Back Attacker, but I'm Gonna Catch the Jerk Who Started That Rumor
overview: Alina and Silver Sword go undercover to find the source of the rumor about relics that grant Dia skills.

title: I've Waited Forever for the Centennial Festival, so I'm Gonna Enjoy It, No Matter What
overview: While Alina finally enjoys her first Centennial Festival, Lululee confronts the shadows of her past.

title: I May Be a Useless Healer, but I'm Going to Do Everything I Can
overview: As Alina and Jade struggle in battle against a dark god, Lululee questions her role as a healer.

title: I May Be in My Third Year as a Guild Receptionist, but I'm Starting New-Employee Training
overview: Alina attends new-employee training in hopes of learning how she can avoid working overtime ever again.

title: A Ghost May Show Up During Training, but Nobody Told Me About It
overview: Jade suspects that the "man in black" who's been luring adventurers into danger is someone he knows very well.

title: It May Be a Trap, but I Have to Keep Moving Forward
overview: Deep beneath guild HQ, Alina and Silver Sword find the "man in black," who finally reveals his identity.

title: I May Be a Guild Receptionist, But I'll Fight to the Bitter End to Get Out of Working Overtime
overview: Glen attacks Alina and Silver Sword ruthlessly, but they still cling to the hope of saving him.
